embedding_text: CVE-2021-3156: Heap-based buffer overflow in sudo due to improper bounds checking in command line parsing.
CVE-2014-6271: Bash command injection via crafted environment variables parsed by shell startup logic.
CVE-2017-5638: Command injection in Apache Struts from attacker-controlled Content-Type header evaluation.
CVE-2015-0235: Out-of-bounds read in glibc gethostbyname implementation leading to information disclosure.
CVE-2014-0160: OpenSSL Heartbleed out-of-bounds read due to missing payload length validation.
